How It Works
1️⃣

Choose an Item

Browse our available Brainrots and select the one you want.

→
2️⃣

Checkout Securely

Pay using Card, PayPal, Apple Pay, or CashApp — all encrypted and safe.

→
3️⃣

Receive Your Item

We deliver your item in-game shortly after purchase — typically within 10–20 minutes.

Why BrainrotShop?
⚡

Fast Delivery

Most orders fulfilled within 10–20 minutes, around the clock.

🔒

Secure Checkout

Stripe-encrypted payments — card, PayPal, Apple Pay & CashApp.

✅

Manual Delivery

Every order is handled manually for a safe, reliable experience.

💰

Best Prices

We keep prices low and competitive across the board.

🎲

Random Mutations

Every order has random M/S assigned — could be Legendary!

💬

Live Support

Real team always available if you need help with your order.

FAQ
Browse the shop, click "Add to Cart", enter your Roblox username at checkout, and pay securely. We deliver your item in-game within 10–20 minutes.
Yes — mutations and M/S rates are 100% random and assigned at delivery. You could receive anything from Common to Legendary!
We accept all major credit/debit cards, PayPal, Apple Pay, and CashApp — all processed securely through Stripe.
All orders are delivered manually by our team. After your payment confirms we begin the delivery process — most complete within 10–20 minutes.
Completely safe. We use only legitimate in-game mechanics. No hacks, no scripts, zero ban risk — backed by our Moneyback Guarantee.
Contact our support team and we will either redeliver immediately or issue a full refund — no questions asked.

Trusted shop for Steal a Brainrot items. Fast manual delivery, secure payments, best prices.
